_readme.what: Single source of truth for community announcements. Both the Announcements page (cardiff-announce.html) and the News page preview card (cardiff-news.html) are built from this file by cardiff-common.js. Edit here only — do not hand-edit the HTML.
_readme.howToPostANotice: Add an object to the "announcements" array below. Date determines placement automatically: a notice dated today or later shows under 'Current notices' and is the one previewed on the News page; once its date has passed it moves to 'Past notices' on its own. No need to move things by hand.

fields.tag: Short kicker above the headline, e.g. 'Community Meeting'. Required.
fields.headline: The notice title. Required.
fields.date: Event/notice date in YYYY-MM-DD (local time). Required. Drives current-vs-past and the date chip.
fields.time: Human-readable time, e.g. '6:00 PM'. Optional — omit for all-day or date-only notices.
fields.location: Where it happens, e.g. 'Town Hall'. Optional.
fields.summary: One short sentence shown in the News page preview card. Optional but recommended; if absent, the first body paragraph is used.
fields.body: Array of paragraphs (strings) shown in the full notice on the Announcements page. Required.
fields.postedBy: Attribution shown in the notice footer, e.g. 'the Cardiff desk'. Optional, defaults to 'the Cardiff desk'.

announcements.headline: Cardiff Community Meeting
announcements.summary: An open community meeting — all residents and neighbors welcome. No formal agenda; bring your questions, concerns, and ideas.
body: All Cardiff residents and neighbors are welcome. This is an open community meeting — bring your questions, concerns, and ideas. There is no formal agenda; the floor belongs to the people who show up.
If you have something specific you would like discussed, come prepared to raise it. Cardiff works best when neighbors talk to each other directly.
